Espresso
iOS App • Free Android APK

Message Anyone on WhatsApp — No Contact Needed

Espresso lets you open a WhatsApp conversation with any phone number, instantly. No saving. No hassle.

Everything You Need

Message without saving

Type or paste any phone number and open a WhatsApp chat instantly.

WhatsApp & Business

Fully compatible with both WhatsApp and WhatsApp Business.

Smart clipboard detection

Copy any number and Espresso instantly offers to open a chat.

Message yourself

Save links, images, and notes to your own WhatsApp chat.

One tap, instant chat

No steps, no friction. Just tap and start chatting.

Multi-Send to many

Paste a list of numbers and send your message to all of them at once — no contacts needed.

Multi-Send

Send to Many. Save No One.

Paste a list of numbers, write your message once, and Espresso blasts it across every WhatsApp conversation in seconds.

⚡Instant delivery📋Paste any list✅Live status🔒No contacts saved

How It Works

01

1. Copy any number

From your call log, a text message, or a website.

02

2. Open Espresso

Espresso automatically detects the copied number.

03

3. Start Chatting

One tap opens a direct WhatsApp chat with that number.

See It in Action

screenshotsSubtext

Works With Business

Whether you use normal WhatsApp or WhatsApp Business, Espresso works perfectly with both. Switching between them is just a tap away.
